title: from_uri contract: construction only, no network calls
description: Every backend's from_uri validates the URI and builds the backend object but makes no network call, file read, or secret fetch. This invariant is consistently maintained across all 13 backends. It is the right design: it allows from_uri to be called at startup to validate configuration (and fail fast with InvalidUri) before any network dependency is needed; it also allows the backend to be constructed in sync contexts without async infrastructure. A contributor might add an 'eagerness' option to prefetch or validate credentials in from_uri; this should be rejected because it breaks the construction-only contract.
